observation: Creator capsule routes now cover poster, prompt DNA, motion storyboard, contact-sheet QA, and skill packaging, but creators still need a post-ready social image that survives platform crops before publish.
population: creator capsule surface mutations for publishable creator artifacts
selection_pressure: help a creator turn one capsule into a crop-safe publishable artifact faster without adding renderer packages or committing raw media

candidates.mutation: Route the existing capsule into a single fixed-canvas poster proof.
candidates.phenotype: HTML poster or PDF proof using existing @dash/measure and @dash/print gates
candidates.risk: May duplicate one-pager work if it does not preserve capsule fields.

candidates.mutation: Add a prompt DNA adapter contract for image/video model experiments without committing raw generated media.
candidates.phenotype: JSON prompt DNA contract plus synthetic fixed-canvas preview card and proof gate
candidates.risk: Could invite raw model output unless the preview artifact stays synthetic and the gate blocks generated media.

candidates.mutation: Add a machine-checked candidate ledger so every Darwin slice names observation, population, candidates, fitness, and selected winner before retention.
candidates.phenotype: creator:mutation-check validates this candidate population and blocks dashboard-only evolution work
candidates.risk: A ledger can become bureaucracy if it is not tied to one retained winner.

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a six-frame motion storyboard before any video renderer or model output is allowed.
candidates.phenotype: JSON motion contract plus fixed-canvas six-frame storyboard proof and machine gate
candidates.risk: Could become a fake video workflow if it does not explicitly stop before raw media and contact-sheet QA.

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a crop-safe 1200x630 social card for post, newsletter, and launch-thread previews.
candidates.phenotype: JSON social surface contract plus fixed-canvas HTML card measured at 1200x630 and exported through the print path
candidates.risk: Could become a generic quote card if the hook, proof stamp, crop zone, and capsule memory are not machine-checked.

retention: Retain creator-social-card-route as the public-safe bridge from capsule memory to post-ready social preview. Keep poster, prompt DNA, motion storyboard, contact-sheet QA, and skill package routes retained; do not add package primitives until multiple social/export surfaces prove the same crop-safe contract.
